introTitle: We accept inquiries through GitHub Issues
lead: Use GitHub Issues for bug reports, improvement ideas, and data corrections. Your report does not need to be perfect. If something looks wrong, please let us know.
flowSteps: Sign in to GitHub. If you do not have an account yet, create one first.
Check the existing issues to see whether the same report already exists.
Open a new issue and describe the problem or improvement you want to share.
points: Make the title specific enough to show what happened or what needs to be improved.
Describe the summary, the current problem, the steps to reproduce, and any supporting details.
Screen names, screenshots, and browser or device details make the report easier to confirm.
templateLines: Screen names, screenshots, environment details, or related links
note: A GitHub account is required. Short reports are welcome, but more detail makes the issue easier to verify.
